mandate: MANDATE: Mac-specific host architecture and permissions. TONE: Zero
Preamble. No conversational filler. Artifacts only.

mac_permissions: Ensure correct handling of Mac privacy permissions (Screen Recording,
input_injection_mac: Ensure input injection complies with Mac security requirements.
audio_capture_permission: Ensure audio capture permission is requested when needed.
process_priority_mac: Ensure user processes have higher priority than root processes on Mac,
and root processes must be suspended when user processes run.
mac_coordinate_system: Convert bottom-left origin for displays to upper-left for consistency
